chapter_title.en: Chapter on the wife's Rights Over Her Husband

text: 4534 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "أَلْهِمُوهُنَّ حُبَّ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ ذَرُوهُنَّ بَلْهَاءَ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4534 - Abdullah ibn Sinan narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) who said:
"Inspire them with the love of Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) and leave them in their natural simplicity."
